ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number or SKU of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer's name */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, out of stock, discontinued) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the variation belongs to */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Color name of the product variation */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product variation */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product variation */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product variation image */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product variation */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product variation */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variation is featured */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for stock management */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product variation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change event */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variation the price change belongs to */,
  "old_price" TEXT /* Old price before the change */,
  "new_price" TEXT /* New price after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price change occurred */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who initiated the price change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage applied */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price change takes effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES product_variations ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, product manager, sales) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
